programme.title: The Ultimatum - EP 19
programme.desc: Zheng Wen Yu was pregnant when she was taken advantage of by her boss Ye Song Nian, the CEO of Phoenix Corporation. Both Wen Yu and Song Nian's wife gave birth to daughters in the same hospital. As fate will have it, the hospital made a mistake and swapped the babies. Because Wen Yu's daughter was diagnosed with congenital heart disease, she kept silent about the mistake so that her daughter can receive the best medical care with Song Nian's wealth.

programme.title: Taste of Life - EP 1086
programme.desc: Chu-Tsai, Chao and his wife have five children. programme.desc: Next stop: Sofia, Bulgaria! Karthick kicks off his day with a local breakfast that tastes like a crispy prata wrapped around an apple pie-yes, you read that right! But that’s just the beginning. He steps into history at the only Ottoman-built mosque in the city, strolls through the charming streets of Bulgaria, and wraps up the day with a feast fit for a king...

programme.title: Ayalaan - EP 15
programme.desc: Meet the M family! Mani, the wide-eyed father and Mages, his bossy wife, are aliens masquerading as humans on Earth, trying to comprehend and study human behavior. Their son, Maran, meets a group of lovable misfits at school while their rebellious daughter, Mangai, feels alienated being the only human in the family. Join this oddball family in Ayalaan - Out of this World on a whimsical journey of understanding the complex beings that are humans!

programme.title: Thayamma Yenna Kaapaathuu! - EP 5
programme.desc: Today's adventure takes Karthick to the breathtaking 7 Rila Lakes-a place where nature flexes its beauty with seven crystal-clear lakes perched high in the mountains. The views? Absolutely stunning! But the real surprise? A humble canteen at the mountain’s peak serving up a hearty beans and sausage meal that’s simple, delicious, and oh-so-satisfying. A perfect mix of scenic hikes and soul-warming food-this is an episode you don’t want to miss!

programme.title: Thayamma Yenna Kaapaathuu! - EP 6
programme.desc: Karthick takes a deep dive into Bulgaria’s past-unraveling stories of independence, Ottoman rule, and the rich history that shaped the nation. He explores an archaeological site right in the middle of the city, stepping through centuries-old ruins. But the real showstopper? Karthick makes history himself by cooking onion curry in Sofia-a feat no one (probably ever) has attempted! Will the locals approve?

programme.title: Abhiyum Naanum - EP 25
programme.desc: In the final stretch, the family moves toward a more honest understanding of themselves and of Abi. Old memories, hidden patterns and unexpected revelations reshape the way they see one another, opening the door to healing. As they return to the site of a defining loss, the family is finally given a chance to reconnect, not as they once were, but as they are now.

programme.desc: A beautiful girl named Fuji (Larasati Nugroho), the owner of a matchmaking agency. One day, Fuji gets a client, a barbershop owner's son named Ivan (Arya Vasco). From there, Ivan is asked by his mother to find a partner. Until finally, Ivan, the barbershop owner, says, "Why don't you be my partner, and I introduce you to my mother?"

programme.title: LIGA DANGDUT 2021 - EP 10
programme.desc: 70 Ambassadors from 34 Provinces compete for the Champion of the Largest Dangdut Competition in Indonesia. Best display, spectacular stage.

programme.title: Cinta Abang Tamvan Pantang Disayurin
programme.desc: Nando (Morgan Oey) helps Sesil (Rayna Snova), who is about to be sold abroad. Nando asks his mother for permission to let Sesil stay at her house.

programme.title: JALAN - JALAN S2 - EP 22
programme.desc: A program that provides information about interesting places for vacations.

programme.title: UNGKAP HIKMAH DI BALIK DOSA - EP 34
programme.desc: Revealing the Wisdom Behind Sin is a project that assesses events or incidents from an Islamic perspective, revealing the wisdom behind sin.

programme.title: Sudah Jatuh Ketiban Duren Iya Lagi Iya Lagi
programme.desc: Juna, a durian tycoon who owns a durian orchard, meets Ambar, unaware that Juna is the boss of the durian orchard that Ambar is looking after. Juna, who is sick because it's his first time working in the field, doesn't get any attention from Maya. But suddenly Maya cheats on him with Aldo. Juna, who finds out, is disappointed with Maya.

programme.title: FOOD ADVENTURE - EP 3
programme.desc: Discover the rich and diverse flavors of Indonesian cuisine - from traditional dishes and street food to heartwarming homemade meals.

programme.title: THE SULTAN ENTERTAINMENT - EP 28
programme.desc: The Sultan is a talk show featuring two sultan-like hosts: Sultan Andara and Raffi Ahmad and Sultan Bintaro and Andre Taulany, accompanied by a cast of beautiful and handsome employees. It features spectacular guest stars and is definitely not to be missed. Find out more at The Sultan Entertainment.

programme.title: JALAN - JALAN S2 - EP 22
programme.desc: A program that provides information about interesting places for vacations.

programme.title: DISEBELAH ADA SURGA - EP 4
programme.desc: The story of three young men named Andhika, Gading, and Uus. All three of them lack spiritual depth. They have spent their youth living carefree lives, indulging in pleasure without a care in the world about their future.

programme.title: Kalung Bisa Dicari Tapi Yang Tulus Tak Datang Dua Kali
programme.desc: A girl named Naura (Larasati Nugroho) desperately needs a job to meet her daily needs. Every company that opens a job always turns her down because her appearance is considered unattractive due to her acne.

programme.title: Lelepati Adalah Komunikasi Cinta Yang Hakiki
programme.desc: It tells the story of a beautiful girl named Tiara. It is said that Tiara did not study seriously while in college. This made Tiara's parents angry, so she was sent to her grandmother's village to take care of catfish. Tiara, who had to adapt to the new environment in the village, also had to respect Jaya, who often annoyed her. Even Jaya also received support from Tiara's grandmother. So why did Tiara suddenly start to like Jaya?

programme.title: FOOD ADVENTURE - EP 4
programme.desc: Discover the rich and diverse flavors of Indonesian cuisine - from traditional dishes and street food to heartwarming homemade meals.

programme.title: JALAN - JALAN S2 - EP 22
programme.desc: A program that provides information about interesting places for vacations.

programme.title: LIGA DANGDUT 2021 - EP 57
programme.desc: 70 Ambassadors from 34 Provinces compete for the Champion of the Largest Dangdut Competition in Indonesia. Best display, spectacular stage.

programme.title: Iya Lagi Ini Montir Cakepnya Bikin Mikir?
programme.desc: Clara (Jennifer Eve), a young doctor, has long fallen in love with a village mechanic named Bayu (Ridho Illahi).

programme.title: Pol PP Cantik Galaknya Bikin Candu
programme.desc: Dimas (Kenny Austin) is caught in a raid by Intan (Yuriska Patricia), who thinks he's a busker. It turns out Dimas isn't just any busker, but the future son-in-law of Burhan, Intan's commander.

programme.title: LIGA DANGDUT 2021 - EP 57
programme.desc: 70 Ambassadors from 34 Provinces compete for the Champion of the Largest Dangdut Competition in Indonesia. Best display, spectacular stage.

programme.title: DISEBELAH ADA SURGA - EP 4
programme.desc: The story of three young men named Andhika, Gading, and Uus. All three of them lack spiritual depth. They have spent their youth living carefree lives, indulging in pleasure without a care in the world about their future.

programme.title: UNGKAP HIKMAH DI BALIK DOSA - EP 34
programme.desc: Revealing the Wisdom Behind Sin is a project that assesses events or incidents from an Islamic perspective, revealing the wisdom behind sin.

programme.title: BUKAN MAIN, NENG KUE CUBIT TAJIR MENDADAK
programme.desc: Choosing a life of simplicity with her father, Yulina must learn to find happiness while selling kue cubit (traditional bite-sized cakes) on the street. Can she find contentment in the little things despite her struggles?

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 183
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Ganteng Sih Tapi Sayang Udah Makan Belum?
programme.desc: Bella (Ochi Rosdiana), a wealthy and beautiful girl, steps out of an ATM only to be knocked over by Ahong (El Ryan Carlen), who is sprinting away from a persistent admirer named Wina. Bella is furious and berates him, but Ahong doesn't look back, leaving Bella fuming in the street.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 637
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 131
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: BUKAN MAIN, NENG KUE CUBIT TAJIR MENDADAK

programme.title: TITIP RINDU BUAT TUKANG CUKUR
programme.desc: Isah (Andi Viola) is a humble barber who considers herself plain and overweight, while her sister Sofi is a stunning beauty. Despite their differences, both sisters find themselves falling for the same man, Bayu (Qausar Harta). Surprisingly, it's the quirky Isah who seems to attract all the attention.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 183
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Manis Manis Bau Amis Tapi Suka
programme.desc: Celine (Hana Saraswati) faces a family curse if she refuses to take over her grandmother's fish restaurant. Despite her severe fish phobia, she flees and nearly crashes into Dion (Marcel Chandrawinata), who is carrying a block of fish. The next day, Celine wakes up reeking of raw fish, causing everyone around her to stay far away.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 637
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: Mencari Tahu Isi Hati Cewek Gorengan
programme.desc: Rizky (Hardi Fadhillah) is forced into a shotgun wedding with Syifa (Jennifer Eve) due to a ridiculous misunderstanding: he accidentally entered the ladies' room and was accused of being a pervert. To make matters more 'fragrant,' Syifa is a fried-food vendor with a peculiar habit of farting whenever she pleases

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 132
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: CHEF TAMPAN MANISNYA WAGELASIH
programme.desc: Determined to reach her dreams in a male-dominated industry, Eka goes undercover as a man just to attend an exclusive class led by a world-renowned chef.

programme.title: Cinta Adik Ipar Tidak Maut Tapi Akut
programme.desc: Febi (Raisya Bawazier) moves in with her older sister, but her presence creates tension as she is wrongly labeled as a 'sister-in-law from hell.' Little does the sister know, Febi’s distraction isn't malice-she’s secretly falling for her cousin-in-law, Edgar (Dylan Carr).

programme.title: CINTA DITOLAK SEBLAK BERTINDAK
programme.desc: After being dumped and betrayed by her best friend, Larasati drowns her sorrows in an extreme amount of spicy seblak. Her spicy binge-eating goes too far, leading her to faint and wake up in an unexpected situation.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 185
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Jika Harimu Berat Ngopi Dulu Bolo
programme.desc: Ranti (Larasati Nugroho), a cheerful coffee vendor, accidentally crashes into a handsome man named Rain (Cakrawala Airawan). Rain was in a rush to propose to his girlfriend, Vivi, but the collision causes him to lose the engagement ring. Now, the 'Coffee Queen' must help him find it.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 639
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 133
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: CINTA DITOLAK SEBLAK BERTINDAK
programme.desc: After being dumped and betrayed by her best friend, Larasati drowns her sorrows in an extreme amount of spicy seblak. Her spicy binge-eating goes too far, leading her to faint and wake up in an unexpected situation.

programme.title: Naluri Hati - EP 20
programme.desc: Pada hari perkahwinannya, Dinda teragak-agak kerana dia akan berkahwin dengan orang yang tidak dicintainya. Namun, satu kejadian berlaku dan menyebabkan Dinda mengalami amnesia separa.

programme.title: Chapalrela - EP 12
programme.desc: Anjang Merah kematian ibu dan terpaksa tinggal dengan ibu tirinya, Mak Jenab dan saudara tirinya Jali Puteh. Anjang Merah sentiasa didera juga ditugaskan menjaga kandang kambing ayahnya, Pak Manap.

programme.title: Cik Bunga Encik Sombong - EP 12
programme.desc: Tidak semena-mena Intan Asnidar yang menghantar bunga menjadi tunangan Harris Isqandar apabila gadis yang sepatutnya menjadi tunangannya melarikan diri. Apakah kesudahannya?

programme.title: Kalau Berani Kampung Stail - EP 11
programme.desc: Setiap minggu Sherry dan ketua kumpulan akan di bawa ke kampung yang berlainan bersama artis jemputan untuk menolong ketua kumpulan memenangi perlawanan mingguan

programme.title: JOZAN - EP 16
programme.desc: Duo pelawak paling popular kini kembali setelah 7 tahun tidak bersama menghiburkan peminat menerusi program bual bicara terbaru yang pasti menghiburkan anda.

programme.title: Jihan Show - EP 9
programme.desc: Tok Wan di hantar untuk duduk bersama cucunya, Amir kerana Tok Wan menghidapi kencing manis dan di arahkan tinggal bersama ahli keluarga untuk mendapat jagaan rapi

programme.title: Bonda Bonding - EP 12
programme.desc: Setiap minggu, saksikan artis kegemaran anda apabila mereka mempunyai pelbagai aktiviti yang mereka suka luangkan bersama ibu mereka yang tersayang. Jangan terlepas detik istimewa bersama mereka!

programme.title: Ek Eleh! Afdlin! Afdlin - EP 2
programme.desc: Rancagan hiburan menarik untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Skrin Komedia: Tuyul Ke London - EP 6
programme.desc: Drama komedi seram tentang sepasang pencuri bertindak menggunakan seekor tuyul untuk mengembangkan jenayah mereka tapi perancangan mereka membawa mereka bertembung dengan pelbagai hantu yang tak disangka.

programme.title: Destinasi Ke Destinasi - EP 13
programme.desc: Rancangan menarik untuk golongan semua.

programme.title: Aku Bukan BIMBO - EP 5
programme.desc: Elsuraya percaya Azad adalah punca kematian ibu bapanya dalam satu kemalangan dan membenci lelaki itu yang dalam diam mencintainya. Perkara sebenar disimpan rapi oleh Azad dan sahabat baiknya, Dani Ikram.

programme.title: Sape Terer - EP 2
programme.desc: Sape Terer merupakan 'game show' yang mempertemukan artis otai dan artis baharu bersaing merebut gelaran juara setiap episod.

programme.title: Joras & Stars - EP 3
programme.desc: Joras & Stars ialah sketsa bersama artis jemputan setiap minggu untuk menghiburkan penonton melalui sketsa yang kelakar.

programme.title: Dahlia - EP 23
programme.desc: Dahlia memiliki segalanya, namun semuanya musnah akibat sikap khianat kawan baiknya sendiri yang ingin merampas semua miliknya termasuk suami, anak & harta.

programme.title: Kennot Brain 2021 - EP 37
programme.desc: Saksikan Alif Farhan & Ain Edruce bersama tetamu jemputan mereka yang pasti kecoh sambil merungkai video-video pelik yang 'trending' pada minggu ini.

programme.title: Gado Gado 2 - EP 10
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan komedi untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Naluri Hati - EP 21
programme.desc: Pada hari perkahwinannya, Dinda teragak-agak kerana dia akan berkahwin dengan orang yang tidak dicintainya. Namun, satu kejadian berlaku dan menyebabkan Dinda mengalami amnesia separa.

programme.title: Betul Ke Bohong Sayang - EP 13
programme.desc: Kesinambungan dari program popular "Betul Ke Bohong" yang menyaksikan pasangan-pasangan bersaing untuk mengelak dari dikenakan kejutan elektrik.

programme.title: Alien Janda Baik
programme.desc: Sebuah kisah tentang sekumpulan makhluk asing yang terhempas di bumi dan cuba mencari jalan pulang. Pelbagai kejadian pelik dan asing terpaksa mereka harung supaya dapat mencari jalan penyelesaian.

programme.title: Sape Terer - EP 1
programme.desc: Sape Terer merupakan 'game show' yang mempertemukan artis otai dan artis baharu bersaing merebut gelaran juara setiap episod.

programme.title: Warung Sepahtu - EP 12
programme.desc: Jom lepak santai sambil sembang dan bergelak tawa bersama Jep, Shuib, Rahim & Pak Ya dalam Warung Sepahtu selain turut menampilkan tetamu undangan yang pasti menghiburkan.

programme.title: Kau Rasa? - EP 11
programme.desc: Rancangan 'prank' yang merakamkan reaksi spontan orang ramai dengan penampilan selebriti undangan.

programme.title: Sketso - EP 10
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan sketsa komedi tentang pencegahan kemalangan untuk pekerja di bawa khas oleh Pertubuhan Keselamatan Pekerja Sosial (PERKESO)

programme.title: #havocwarna - EP 24
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan yang menggabungkan sketsa, spontan, prank, zumba dan lain lain lagi

programme.title: Jihan Show - EP 10
programme.desc: Riuh rendah dibuatnya apabila Jihan berkumpul dengan teman-teman. Pelbagai topik jadi perbualan bila semua "girlfriends" bersatu.

programme.title: Masak Wars - EP 5
programme.desc: Setiap minggu, 5 peserta mewakili negeri masing-masing akan bertanding untuk membuktikan masakan negeri mereka yang terbaik. Dihoskan oleh Keanu Azman.

programme.title: Warna Live: Arena Panggang - EP 3
programme.desc: Bergelak tawa bersama Nabil, Johan, Dato' Afdlin, Ajak Shiro, Jihan Muse dan ramai lagi dalam program 'membahan' bersama pelawak popular. Saksikan gelagat mereka yang pasti menghiburkan anda sekeluarga.

programme.title: Sepahtu Reunion Live 2019 - EP 7
programme.desc: Sebuah program menarik untuk tontona semua.

programme.title: Kalau Berani Kampung Stail - EP 12
programme.desc: Setiap minggu Sherry dan ketua kumpulan akan di bawa ke kampung yang berlainan bersama artis jemputan untuk menolong ketua kumpulan memenangi perlawanan mingguan

programme.title: Komediri S2 - EP 9
programme.desc: Bual bicara berbentuk komedi membariskan artis-artis jemputan daripada kalangan pelawak, selebriti, dan juga influencer untuk berkongsi cerita dan rasa.

programme.title: Elak Elak S2 - EP 1
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan sketsa yang menengahkan kisah-kisah tauladan yang akan di terajui oleh Achey, Fad, Ajak, dan Zulin.

programme.title: Yak Yak Yey - EP 1
programme.desc: Himpunan sketsa komedi pendek pecah perut yang menggabungkan selebriti tanah air terdiri daripada pelawak,pelakon,penyanyi dan pempengaruh media sosial .

programme.title: Ngaroot - EP 5
programme.desc: Polis Sentri ialah sebuah program variasi yang menampilkan 10 artis tanah air termasuk personaliti sosial media. Misi mereka adalah untuk berjaya dalam semua cabaran yang diberi.

programme.title: CTDK-ation - EP 10
programme.desc: Program realiti perjalanan Dato Sri Siti Nurhaliza 'VACATION' adalah program menampilkan keluarga besar Dato Sri Siti Nurhaliza.

programme.title: Naluri Hati - EP 21

programme.desc: Tok Wan di hantar untuk duduk bersama cucunya, Amir kerana Tok Wan menghidapi kencing manis dan di arahkan tinggal bersama ahli keluarga untuk mendapat jagaan rapi

programme.title: Bonda Bonding - EP 13
programme.desc: Setiap minggu, saksikan artis kegemaran anda apabila mereka mempunyai pelbagai aktiviti yang mereka suka luangkan bersama ibu mereka yang tersayang. Jangan terlepas detik istimewa bersama mereka!

programme.title: Ek Eleh! Afdlin! Afdlin - EP 3
programme.desc: Rancagan hiburan menarik untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Skrin Komedia: Tuyul Ke London - EP 7
programme.desc: Drama komedi seram tentang sepasang pencuri bertindak menggunakan seekor tuyul untuk mengembangkan jenayah mereka tapi perancangan mereka membawa mereka bertembung dengan pelbagai hantu yang tak disangka.

programme.title: Kiah Pekasam - EP 1
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang Kiah yang sangat jujur di dalam percakapannya memulakan kehidupan baru di kampungnya.

programme.title: Aku Bukan BIMBO - EP 6
programme.desc: Elsuraya percaya Azad adalah punca kematian ibu bapanya dalam satu kemalangan dan membenci lelaki itu yang dalam diam mencintainya. Perkara sebenar disimpan rapi oleh Azad dan sahabat baiknya, Dani Ikram.

programme.title: Sembang Pacak S2 - EP 6
programme.desc: Sebuah drama untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Joras & Stars - EP 4
programme.desc: Joras & Stars ialah sketsa bersama artis jemputan setiap minggu untuk menghiburkan penonton melalui sketsa yang kelakar.

programme.title: Dahlia - EP 24
programme.desc: Dahlia memiliki segalanya, namun semuanya musnah akibat sikap khianat kawan baiknya sendiri yang ingin merampas semua miliknya termasuk suami, anak & harta.

programme.title: Kennot Brain 2021 - EP 38
programme.desc: Saksikan Alif Farhan & Ain Edruce bersama tetamu jemputan mereka yang pasti kecoh sambil merungkai video-video pelik yang 'trending' pada minggu ini.

programme.title: Gado Gado 2 - EP 11
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan komedi untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Naluri Hati - EP 22
programme.desc: Pada hari perkahwinannya, Dinda teragak-agak kerana dia akan berkahwin dengan orang yang tidak dicintainya. Namun, satu kejadian berlaku dan menyebabkan Dinda mengalami amnesia separa.

programme.title: Betul Ke Bohong? S7 - EP 1
programme.desc: Betul Ke Bohong? musim ketujuh membawa Johan sebagai hos dan Ray, Haniff, Angah dan Achey sebagai kapten kumpulan, Nantikan siapa artis jemputan untuk minggu ini

programme.title: Izinkan Aku
programme.desc: Konflik berlaku kepada seorang gadis di mana ibunya menentang minat dan cita-cita anaknya untuk menjadi seorang penulis novel kerana bagi ibunya, menjadi penulis novel tidak menjanjikan masa depan.

programme.title: Warung Sepahtu S2 - EP 1
programme.desc: Kembali dengan musim kedua, saksikan Jep, Rahim dan Pak Ya berborak santai bersama tetamu undangan yang pasti menghiburkan anda sekeluarga.

programme.title: Kau Rasa? - EP 12
programme.desc: Rancangan 'prank' yang merakamkan reaksi spontan orang ramai dengan penampilan selebriti undangan.

programme.title: Sketso S2 - EP 1
programme.desc: Sebuah program menarik untuk tontona semua.

programme.title: #havocwarna - EP 25
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan yang menggabungkan sketsa, spontan, prank, zumba dan lain lain lagi

programme.title: Jihan Show - EP 11
programme.desc: Riuh rendah dibuatnya apabila Jihan berkumpul dengan teman-teman. Pelbagai topik jadi perbualan bila semua "girlfriends" bersatu.

programme.title: Legenda Puteri Qaseh S2 - EP 5
programme.desc: Legenda Puteri Qaseh kembali untuk musim ke-2! Sebagai Permaisuri Kayajaya, dia menghadapi cabaran konspirasi merampas takhta, wabak Achum mengancam nyawa dan dijodohkan dengan Putera Nusaria.

programme.title: Warna Live: Arena Panggang - EP 4
programme.desc: Bergelak tawa bersama Nabil, Johan, Dato' Afdlin, Ajak Shiro, Jihan Muse dan ramai lagi dalam program 'membahan' bersama pelawak popular. Saksikan gelagat mereka yang pasti menghiburkan anda sekeluarga.

programme.title: Sepahtu Reunion Live 2019 - EP 8
programme.desc: Sebuah program menarik untuk tontona semua.

programme.title: Kalau Berani Kampung Stail - EP 13

programme.title: Komediri S2 - EP 10
programme.desc: Bual bicara berbentuk komedi membariskan artis-artis jemputan daripada kalangan pelawak, selebriti, dan juga influencer untuk berkongsi cerita dan rasa.

programme.title: Elak Elak S2 - EP 2
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan sketsa yang menengahkan kisah-kisah tauladan yang akan di terajui oleh Achey, Fad, Ajak, dan Zulin.

programme.title: Yak Yak Yey - EP 2
programme.desc: Himpunan sketsa komedi pendek pecah perut yang menggabungkan selebriti tanah air terdiri daripada pelawak,pelakon,penyanyi dan pempengaruh media sosial .

programme.title: Ngaroot - EP 6
programme.desc: Polis Sentri ialah sebuah program variasi yang menampilkan 10 artis tanah air termasuk personaliti sosial media. Misi mereka adalah untuk berjaya dalam semua cabaran yang diberi.

programme.title: Jep & Judin - EP 1
programme.desc: Jep dan Judin adik-beradik tiri yang lurus bendul meminati sukan bermotor. Jep mahu jadi Johan Rempit dan Judin mahu menolongnya mencapai mimpi itu.

programme.title: Kutinggalkan Cinta di Okinawa - EP 17
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang Alisa yang cuba untuk menjejaki ibu kandungnya. Sepanjang perjalanan itu dia mengenali Raykal dan Shun. Siapakah di antara dua lelaki ini yang dapat memenangi hati Alisa?

programme.title: Impiana S4 - EP 14
programme.desc: Kini Impiana lebih berarah kepada golongan Malaynial, dipenuhi dengan segmen yang penuh inspirasi bertujuan untuk dijadikan destinasi rujukan bagi penonton mencari idea untuk hiasan rumah mereka.

programme.title: Bukan Cinta Sempurna - EP 47
programme.desc: Luqman kini sudah bergelar suami kepada Marina. Johari masih memaksa Marina untuk mendapatkan duit daripada keluarga Luqman. Qistina masih terkilan dengan apa yang telah berlaku kepada dirinya.

programme.title: Cinta Tapi Benci - EP 11
programme.desc: Semua wanita yang didekati Migo hanya untuk memenuhi keperluan pertaruhannya bersamai dengan rakan-rakan dan juga membuktikan dirinya sebagai playboy sejati.

programme.title: Malaysian Ghost Stories - EP 7
programme.desc: Nusantara merupakan satu daerah yang tebal dengan semangat mistik dan alam ghaib. Setiap episod mempunyai penyelesaian yang unik bergantung kepada jenis gangguan, jenis jin dan kesan ke atas watak utama.

programme.title: Azam & Johan - EP 2
programme.desc: Azam & Johan bercita-cita menjadi pemain bola sepak profesional. Kemalangan menyebabkan Azam lumpuh, memusnahkan impian bola sepaknya. Ibu mereka menyalahkan Johan atas kemalangan itu.

programme.title: Bunga Hati - EP 7
programme.desc: Dilaila seorang gadis yang tabah melalui dugaan kini dalam kesedihan kerana nenek kesayangannya meninggal dunia, menambah lagi kesedihan apabila melihat abangnya didera oleh emaknya sendiri.

programme.title: Lelaki Macam Dia - EP 15
programme.desc: Fahmi dan Husna merupakan jiran yang tinggal bersebelahan rumah. Fahmi seorang yang lurus dan tidak mempunyai perwatakan yang menarik akhirnya mampu berubah menjadi seorang "superstar" dan memikat hati Hus

programme.title: See You In Valhalla
programme.desc: Selepas kematian pelik abangnya, seorang wanita muda bersatu kembali dengan keluarganya yang aneh, kemudian harus menyelam kembali masa silamnya yang penuh masalah.

programme.title: Ready Set Action S2 - EP 5
programme.desc: Travelog artis-artis tempatan membawa peminat bertuahnya untuk meneroka tempat ikonik yang pernah menjadi lokasi latar belakang adegan filem terkenal dalam Ready, Set, Action! musim ke 2.

programme.title: Pok Ya Cong Codei Memburu Siti - EP 7

programme.title: Sedapur Bersama - EP 1

programme.title: PHD Muzik - EP 6

programme.title: Bukan Cinta Sempurna - EP 47
programme.desc: Luqman kini sudah bergelar suami kepada Marina. Johari masih memaksa Marina untuk mendapatkan duit daripada keluarga Luqman. Qistina masih terkilan dengan apa yang telah berlaku kepada dirinya.

programme.title: Liar - EP 2
programme.desc: Apabila pihak polis gagal melindungi Lara, Fariz membantu Lara untuk mencari rahsia Aiman. Namun, muncul seorang lelaki dari masa lampau Lara untuk mempertahankan Aiman.

programme.title: Tejas
programme.desc: Indian Air Force officer Tejas embarks on a risky mission to rescue an Indian spy from Pakistan. Along the way, she battles both formidable adversaries and haunting personal demons from her past. Release Year: 2023 Director: Sarvesh Mewara

programme.title: Laila Majnu
programme.desc: Two lovers from Kashmir are separated by family opposition and circumstances, leading Qais into obsession as their intense love story unfolds through pain, longing, and tragic destiny. Release Year: 1976 Director: Harnam Singh Rawail

programme.title: Angaaray
programme.desc: After Aarti is assaulted by her employer, her brother Sanjay tries to avenge her but is killed. Grief-stricken yet determined, Aarti decides to fight back and bring her attacker to justice. Release Year: 1986 Director: Rajesh Seth, Rajesh Sethi

programme.title: Daas Dev
programme.desc: Dev, heir to a political legacy, struggles with power, love, and addiction as his relationships with Paro and Chandni spiral, leading him into a complex web of ambition and self-destruction Release Year: 2018 Director: Sudhir Mishra

programme.title: Enemmy
programme.desc: After five undercover police officers take up the task of protecting Mumbai from gang wars, they arrest their prime suspect, Mukhtar. Later, a CBI officer, Yugantar, investigates the case. Release Year: 2013 Director: Ashu Trikha

programme.title: Aao Pyar Karen
programme.desc: Raja, wealthy and romantic, wants to marry a poor girl. His grandmother disapproves, repeating history. Raja must choose between family expectations and true love, just like his father once did. Release Year: 1994 Director: Ravindra Peepat

programme.title: Kahaani 2: Durga Rani Singh
programme.desc: In a small town, Vidya cares for Minnie, a girl with paralysis. When Minnie is kidnapped, Vidya attempts a rescue but suffers an accident, landing in hospital while Minnie's fate hangs in danger. Release Year: 2016 Director: Sujoy Ghosh

programme.title: Bol Radha Bol
programme.desc: Kishan returns to revive his father's factory and falls in love, but someone has taken his place back home, drawing him into danger and unexpected rivalry. Release Year: 1992 Director: David Dhawan

programme.title: Haan Maine Bhi Pyaar Kiya
programme.desc: Shiv and Pooja share a happy marriage until she discovers his infidelity. When film star Raj enters her life, love, choices, and self-worth are tested unexpectedly by fate. Release Year: 2002 Director: Dharmesh Darshan Awards: 2003 Winner, Reader's Choice - Best Supporting ActreSS - Simone Singh

programme.title: Phobia
programme.desc: Traumatized artist Mehak isolates herself after an assault. In a new home, her fear grows as terrifying visions suggest a dark presence haunting her fragile mind. Release Year: 2016 Director: Pavan Kirpalani Awards: 2017 Winner Technical Award- Best Sound Design- Vivek Sachidanand

programme.title: Aao Pyar Karen
programme.desc: Raja, wealthy and romantic, wants to marry a poor girl. His grandmother disapproves, repeating history. Raja must choose between family expectations and true love, just like his father once did. Release Year: 1994 Director: Ravindra Peepat

programme.title: Bol Radha Bol
programme.desc: Kishan returns to revive his father's factory and falls in love, but someone has taken his place back home, drawing him into danger and unexpected rivalry. Release Year: 1992 Director: David Dhawan

programme.title: Ab Tumhare Hawale Watan Saathiyo
programme.desc: Kunal joins the Indian Army to honor his family tradition. He is drawn into a fierce battle against terrorists threatening peace between India and Pakistan, testing his courage. Release Year: 2004 Director: Anil Sharma

programme.title: Chakravyuh
programme.desc: Kabir infiltrates a Naxal group on Adil's orders but begins to empathize with them, creating a painful conflict between duty, friendship, and his shaken beliefs. Release Year: 2012 Director: Prakash Jha

programme.title: Chennai V/S China
programme.desc: Dong Lee arrives to start a biological war, but a student revives ancient Bodhidharma powers through genetics to stop him and save humanity.

programme.title: Enemmy
programme.desc: After five undercover police officers take up the task of protecting Mumbai from gang wars, they arrest their prime suspect, Mukhtar. Later, a CBI officer, Yugantar, investigates the case. Release Year: 2013 Director: Ashu Trikha

programme.title: Aetbar
programme.desc: Dr. Ranveer tries to stop Ria, his daughter, from pursuing a romantic relationship with Aryan, an unpredictable and possessive man. She does not heed her father's words and continues dating him.

programme.title: Rocky Handsome
programme.desc: John Abraham plays reclusive pawn shop owner who sets his sights on revenge when vicious gangsters kidnap his drug-addicted neighbours daughter. Heart-stopping action adventure.

programme.title: Dooriyan
programme.desc: A married couple struggles to balance their personal and professional life which causes them to separate and it affects their child.

programme.title: The Making Of Pk
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: Costao
programme.desc: In the 1990s, customs officer Costao Fernandes becomes a legend in Goa due to his bravery and tactics. His personal and professional life unravels when he kills a powerful drug lord in self-defence.

programme.title: Extraaa Storiez: 12th Fail
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: Tu Jhoothi Main Makkar
programme.desc: To earn extra cash, Mickey helps couples break up. However, life gets complicated when he falls for Tinni, a career woman with an independent streak.

programme.title: Anurodh
programme.desc: A rich businessman disapproves of his son's passion for singing. This leads to friction between them, causing the boy to leave home. He adopts a new identity when he becomes a popular singer.

programme.title: Afwaah
programme.desc: A woman seeks to escape her engagement to a violent politician, but when a stranger comes to her aid, the two face an onslaught of bigotry and hate.

programme.title: Ek Anokhi Prem Kahani
programme.desc: A boy falls for her senior in a college and both love each other unconditionally. However, they face a sudden threat to their relationship after they live together.

programme.title: Zara Hatke Zara Bachke
programme.desc: Kapil and Somya are a happily married couple who live in a joint family and decide to get a divorce. Things don't go as planned as their family gets to know of it, and thus begins a comedy of errors.

programme.title: Mere Husband Ki Biwi
programme.desc: A divorced man's life turns chaotic when his college crush returns just as his amnesiac ex-wife reappears, sparking a hilarious love triangle full of confusion

programme.title: Pk
programme.desc: An innocent alien lands on Earth but loses his communication device. He meets Jaggu, a heartbroken reporter, and tries to find his device. With time, he raises many thought-provoking questions.

programme.title: Thamma
programme.desc: Two destined lovers battle supernatural forces, family ties, and nature itself to defend their forbidden romance in a mystical world where ancient powers and prophecies threaten to keep them apart.

programme.title: Farzand
programme.desc: Kondaji Farzand, along with a large group of warriors, sets out to battle Adil Shah in order to recapture the Panhala Fort.

programme.title: Mahavatar Narsimha
programme.desc: Hiranyakashyap, a demon, challenges Vishnu, proclaiming himself a god. However, his son Prahlad remains devoted to Vishnu, who appears as Narsimha to defeat the demon.

programme.title: Extraa Shots Ludo

programme.title: Malaal
programme.desc: Two very different people from contrasting backgrounds experience the innocence of love.

programme.title: Man Ki Aankhen

programme.title: Mulk
programme.desc: One family member tries to help her own family when they are trapped in a dark controversy.

programme.title: Shakuntala Devi: A Human Computer
programme.desc: Shakuntala Devi, a mathematician's journey to become 'The Human Computer' and her relationship with her daughter.

programme.title: Tera Kya Hoga Lovely

programme.title: Param Sundari
programme.desc: Two hearts collide as a North and South Indian unexpectedly fall for each other. Their diverse backgrounds ignite a comedic and tumultuous love story, brimming with cultural misadventures.

programme.title: Khel Khel Mein
programme.desc: Friends at a dinner play a game where everyone unlocks their phones and shares their messages and calls. The game starts out as fun but it takes a turn when secrets are revealed.

programme.desc: Narmada's mission to her ancestral village to reunite her father & his estranged family entwines with Kathir's task of finding suitable grooms for his three sisters. What unfolds when they fall in love, striving for a cause against the same enemy?

programme.title: AADUKALAM

programme.title: Karnan
programme.desc: Karnan, a fearless village youth, must fight for the rights of the conservative people of his village, due to the torture given by a police officer.

programme.title: Street Fighter - EP 1
programme.desc: Street Fighters Ryu and Ken reunite when Chun-Li recruits them for the World Warrior Tournament. As they face a hidden conspiracy, they must confront each other and their past-or face destruction.

programme.title: Dhanusu Raasi Neyargale - EP 1
programme.desc: A man ends up falling in love with a girl he meets during his ex-lover's wedding. However, they part ways as he believes in astrology while she being an astronaut believes in astronomy.

programme.title: August 16 1947 - EP 1
programme.desc: Amid India's independence celebration, the news fails to reach Sengadu, a remote village oppressed by Robert Clive. Param rises to lead the liberation of the villagers.

programme.title: Dora - EP 1
programme.desc: A young woman buys a vintage car that behaves oddly, only to discover it's possessed by a vengeful spirit connected to her past.

programme.title: Desingu Raja - EP 1
programme.desc: Idhyakani falls for Bindu Madhavi despite their families' rivalry. The lovers try to unite them, but their efforts lead to a conflict between the families.

programme.title: Salim - EP 1
programme.desc: Salim, a doctor, runs into trouble for being too generous towards his patients. Soon, his patience with the justice system snaps and he takes the law into his own hands.

programme.title: Sindhubadh - EP 1

programme.desc: This mystery-thriller series revolves around an alluring woman named Juliana and her illicit affair with Alex, a lawyer who also happens to be the brother of Juliana's husband, Victor, a washed-up boxer. What is the story behind Juliana's betrayal and infidelity?

programme.desc: Vincent is accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real.

programme.desc: The Secrets of Hotel 88 dives into a gripping story of the estranged Fernandez brothers - Martin, Gio and Kiko - who unexpectedly inherit Hotel 88 following their father's death. programme.desc: The bodies of two gallery-owners have been found. Murders that seem to echo the disappearance of an artist twenty years earlier. programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 38
programme.desc: I left here as a boy and I'm definitely coming back as a man. With 25 goals in Aston Villa's promotion-winning Championship season in 2018/19, Tammy Abraham still holds a special place in the hearts of Villa fans. Having risen through the ranks at Chelsea but then moved on by Thomas Tuchel, a determination to succeed saw him win plaudits wherever he played - For Roma and AC Milan in Serie A and lately for Besiktas, but Abraham has unfinished business in the Premier League.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 48
programme.desc: We speak to Dimitar Berbatov, a player whose elegance and composure left a lasting imprint on English football. Focusing on his Premier League years, we follow his rise at Tottenham Hotspur, where his effortless style first captivated fans, through to his trophy-laden spell at Manchester United, where moments of brilliance were often matched by intense scrutiny.

programme.title: FS MMA Mariusz Pudzianowski vs. Artur Szpilka
programme.desc: This episode of FIGHT SPORTS MMA showcases action from KSW 83 in Warsaw, Poland where World's Strongest Man, Mariusz Pudzianowski takes on former boxer Artur Szpilka.

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 Jean Pascal vs. Chad Dawson
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features a Light Heavyweight Unification battle as WBO Champion Jean Pascal (25-1, 16 KOs) takes on undefeated IBO Champion, Chad Dawson, (29-0, 17 KOs) on August 14, 2010 at the Bell Centre in Montreal, Quebec, Canada. The fight ends in a decision after a controverial headbutt.

programme.title: Mega Fights In 60 Joel Julio vs.James Kirkland
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features a Super Welterweight, 10 Round contest featuring Joel Julio (34-2, 31 KOs) vs.undefeated James Kirkland, aka 'Mandingo Warrior' (24-0, 21 KOs) from the HP Pavilion in San Jose, California, USA on March 3, 2009.

programme.title: Fight Quest
programme.desc: Episode 12: Kerala, India - Hosts Jimmy Smith and Doug Anderson learn the Fight Discipline of Kalarippayattu and the Martial Art of Sword, Shield, Sticks, Open Hand and Kicks with Master Sureshan Nambiar.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Keith Thurman vs. Carlos Quintana
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is the undefeated Keith Thurman taking on Carlos Quintana. Also on the card, kickboxing super heavyweight legend Daniel Ghita faces off against Brice Guidon.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: Top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 5 features Hakuho, Aoiyama, Asanoyama and Kakuryu from the Osaka Prefectural Gymnasium in Osaka, Japan.

programme.title: Karate 1 Premier League
programme.desc: Fukuoka, Japan welcomes the top talent in the world of martial arts when Karate 1 Premier League returns. Fukuoka will host athletes from across the globe including last season's Grand Winners such as Hikaru Ono and Ayaka Saito competing in their home country. The World Karate Federation expects another tremendous turnout, featuring Olympic medalists and world-ranked competitors, when the Karate 1 Premier League visits the port city of Fukuoka, Japan, on FIGHT SPORTS.

programme.title: Pariah: Sonny Liston
programme.desc: Was Sonny Liston murdered? This four-part documentary series explores the life and untimely death of boxing legend Charles 'Sonny' Liston, who became the heavyweight champion of the world when he knocked out Floyd Patterson in 1962. Unfortunately, just eight years later, he was found dead in his Las Vegas home from an alleged heroin overdose. Suspicion regarding the real cause of his death has continued to this day. Episode 2 of 4.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The top 30 competitors from the Houston Qualifier tackle the Houston Finals course, which includes such obstacles as the Salmon Ladder, Walking Bar, Crazy Cliffhanger and Invisible Ladder.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Jhonny Gonzalez vs Gerry Penalosa
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is Jhonny Gonzalez defending the WBO bantamweight title against Gerry Penalosa. A left hook to the body ends the fight. Also on the card, a controversial ending to the Nate Campbell / Ali Funeka brawl.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. From the Ryogoku Kokugikan Arena in Tokyo, Japan, Show 2 features Kagayaki, Asanoyama, Daieisho and Aoiyama.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Amir Khan vs. Danny Garcia
programme.desc: This episode features a Light Welterweight title bout between the unbeaten Danny Garcia and #1 contender Amir Khan, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: Pariah: Sonny Liston
programme.desc: Was Sonny Liston murdered? This four-part documentary series explores the life and untimely death of boxing legend Charles 'Sonny' Liston, who became the heavyweight champion of the world when he knocked out Floyd Patterson in 1962. Unfortunately, just eight years later, he was found dead in his Las Vegas home from an alleged heroin overdose. Suspicion regarding the real cause of his death has continued to this day. Episode 4 of 4.

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S3) - EP 21

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 7

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 2
programme.desc: The Squirrels are looking for Duggee but can't find him. Instead, they find someone who looks like Enid, only much too big. Duggee has painted his face to look like Enid!

programme.desc: Tim explores Rumbleton to find somewhere he can have fun alone. // Tim and Kai try to give Parky the best day ever. // When a storm keeps the Rexes at home they must think of a game to pass the time.

programme.desc: Dora stops a frantic octopus Swiper and saves the Pearl Day Party! // Dora meets Raquel the Rock Lobster and helps her get the missing instruments back in time to play at the big music show!

programme.title: Peppa Pig S2 - EP 222
programme.desc: It is Sports Day at Peppa's playgroup. There are lots of exciting events, including running, jumping and the "tug of war". Daddy Pig tells Peppa that it's not the winning that matters.

programme.title: Peppa Pig S2 - EP 223
programme.desc: Peppa's car runs out of petrol but thankfully Granddad Dog's garage isn't far away. With one phone call, Granddad Dog is on his way. He tows Peppa's car back to his garage.

programme.title: Peppa Pig S2 - EP 224
programme.desc: Peppa wins the top prize in a raffle at school: a trip in a hot air balloon. Mummy Pig, Daddy Pig, George and Peppa climb aboard and enjoy the flight until the balloon gets caught in a tree. Luckily, the balloon has landed in a very familiar garden.

programme.title: Peppa Pig S2 - EP 225
programme.desc: Peppa and George love jumping in puddles, even when it's raining - but when George takes off his rain hat, he catches a cold. After a while George is feeling much better. Now he's more than happy to wear his rain hat, even when it's not raining.

programme.title: Peppa Pig S2 - EP 226
programme.desc: Pedro Pony wears glasses. Peppa thinks she might need glasses too, so Mummy Pig takes her to the optician. Peppa is a little disappointed to discover that she has perfect vision - but that doesn't stop her wearing some rather fabulous sunglasses.

programme.title: Peppa Pig S2 - EP 227
programme.desc: The grass has grown so long that Peppa and George's ball gets lost. Grandpa arrives with his fantastic lawnmower and gets the grass cut in no time. Peppa and George find their plastic ball again and it bounces brilliantly on the short grass!

programme.title: Peppa Pig S2 - EP 228
programme.desc: Mr. Zebra the Postman gets help from his daughter Zoe. Zoe has a very special letter for Peppa and George; an invitation to her birthday party. The party is fun, especially as it turns out that Zoe has invited all of Peppa and George's friends.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S5 - EP 507
programme.desc: Gasquatch invites Blaze and AJ to his ice cream party! But he forgot something important - the ice cream! So, Blaze transforms into an Ice Cream Truck and races to reach Gasquatch's house in time!

programme.title: PAW Patrol S3 - EP 309
programme.desc: A fantasy fire breathing dragon comes to life and won't let Ryder and pups into the Lookout! Paw Patrol takes to the Air Patroller! // The Paw Patrol help three little pigs build new houses after theirs mysteriously disappear.

programme.desc: The Pups must help to find Mayor Humdinger's mustache after he accidentally shaves it off before it's about to be on the cover of a magazine.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew S4 - EP 406
programme.desc: Cafe Carl's kittens cause construction chaos in the Bark Yard! Can the crew create a conclusion to the cat catastrophe?

programme.desc: Barbazoo have plenty of things to write about in his diary! // After reading the biography of Nellie Bly, Barbalib is determined to become a Great Reporter!

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 25

Meanwhile, Cisco's uncle Tuco, a famous luchador in Mexico, is visiting town promoting his next show. But the celebration comes to a halt when there's an explosion at the party and an attack by a mysterious group of criminals!

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 26

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 6

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: 17-year-old Tony Toretto and his gang are psyched when Dom recommends them to Ms. Nowhere for a spy racing job. Excited to get the opportunity to live up to Dom’s legacy, they use their street smarts and driving skills to infiltrate a race with SH1FT3R, a high-octane racing circuit whose drivers are all under 20.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: Tony goes head-to-head with SH1FT3R’s main recruiter Layla Gray in a death-defying spy race through LA Tunnels, parking lots and construction sites. Tony’s awesome driving impresses Shashi Dhar (the head of SH1FT3R and the person Ms. Nowhere wants them to investigate), and after Tony and his crew pull a heist on a big rig full of energy drinks for Shashi, they’re officially accepted into the circuit.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: Tony races against Shashi and Layla through a Northern California ghost town, but Shashi and Layla are using the race as a cover for a heist on a billionaire’s train. Tony and his team are introduced to the other cool SH1FT3R racers, and while they can’t stop the heist without blowing their cover, they do manage to get a tracker on the train car Shashi and Layla stole.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: Shashi sends Tony and Layla to steal weapons codes from a Russian oligarch, while Margaret "Echo" Pearl, Cisco and Frostee use Shashi’s absence to sneak into Shashi’s Cliffside mansion to investigate. Ms. Nowhere tells the team to look for the "keys" in Shashi’s mansion, but all they find are a couple of awesome super-cars.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: Shashi stages a race up the privately-owned Mount Zebulon, and he invites Tony, Cisco, and Margaret "Echo" Pearl to participate. The crew soon discovers that Shashi is using the race to steal another super-car (this time from space!) - and he knows that Tony is working with the feds.

programme.title: The UnXplained With William Shatner (S3) - EP 27
programme.desc: Graves, tombs, cremations are respectful ways to provide the deceased with a resting place. Is it possible that some of these practices can preserve the soul for eternity? Or bring the dead back to life?

programme.title: Booked: First Day In (S1) - EP 7
programme.desc: A teen gets nabbed for being in the wrong place at the wrong time, while a man who left town with a warrant gets caught when he returns for his aunt's funeral and faces a one million dollar bail.

programme.title: City Confidential (S8) - EP 15
programme.desc: When a young woman's body is pulled from the ocean off the Big Island, accusations threaten to destroy the local community. As tensions grow, a surprising discovery leads detectives to a devastating truth.

programme.title: Evil Up Close (S6) - EP 10
programme.desc: Stephen Hough got away with raping and killing 16-year-old Janet Cummings. He fabricated an alibi for his crimes and let an innocent man go to jail. Four decades later, detectives made a breakthrough.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: DNA Speaks - EP 8
programme.desc: When gambler Scott Martinez, 47, is found eviscerated by a sword in his La Mesa, CA, home, investigators can't tell who is telling the truth within his inner circle.

programme.title: The First 48 (S26) - EP 514
programme.desc: Detective Angela Carter takes over the case of a missing teenage girl and wonders if the key to her disappearance could lie shockingly close to home.

programme.title: Homicide Squad New Orleans (S1) - EP 3
programme.desc: Amid the vibrant chaos of New Orleans' Mardi Gras celebrations, gunshots shatter the festive atmosphere of the French Quarter, leaving a man dead.

programme.title: Homicide Squad New Orleans (S1) - EP 4
programme.desc: Early on Sunday morning, Detective Tanisha Sykes Smith responds to a man found deceased from multiple gunshot wounds alongside a building in the Lower 9th Ward.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S2) - EP 4
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country: a man takes an alligator grocery shopping; an alleged thief tries a strange tactic to mask his identity; and more!

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S2) - EP 5
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country: a senior citizen wields an unusual weapon-her mouth; a suspected criminal uses a local police station as a drive-thru; and more!

programme.desc: Kelsey's family knew something was amiss when their usually responsible and responsive daughter didn't respond to their texts while out running an errand.

programme.title: The First 48 (S26) - EP 515
programme.desc: Tulsa police find a woman beaten to death during a welfare check, and a son witnesses his father's murder while renovating a house.

programme.title: Murder In The 21st - EP 7
programme.desc: A sudden illness takes hold of a beloved doctor, leaving her family helpless as the illness takes a fatal turn. The investigation into her death takes her family on a harrowing journey.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: DNA Speaks - EP 6
programme.desc: When Linda Slaten is brutally strangled in her Lakeland, FL, home, a web of suspects emerges. The case takes a dramatic turn when a DNA hit exposes the sinister underbelly of this peaceful community.

programme.title: Court Cam (S6) - EP 157
programme.desc: A look at some of the wildest courtroom moments. A fugitive shows up to the courthouse but changes his mind and flees from officers; an assault victim confronts her attacker in court; and more.

programme.title: Court Cam (S6) - EP 158
programme.desc: A look at some of the wildest courtroom moments. An accused murderer escapes from the courthouse; a teenager goes on trial for robbing a 9-year-old selling Girl Scout cookies; and more.

programme.title: After The First 48 (S15) - EP 109
programme.desc: In Gwinnett County, a beloved rapper is gunned down in a hail of bullets from a drive-by shooting. With little hard evidence, detectives and prosecutors need to rely on a tipster to testify.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty Or Innocent? (S3) - EP 12
programme.desc: A young man stabs another man who assaulted his brother and attempted to steal from their family-run petrol station. Was it attempted murder or self defence?

programme.title: After The First 48 (S16) - EP 118
programme.desc: After an immigrant, lured by a woman, is beaten to death, Gwinnett County Police discover that one of the three suspects believes no one will care about him because he's Mexican.

programme.title: After The First 48 (S15) - EP 105
programme.desc: In Mobile, a professor is murdered in his own home. It takes a missing gaming console and a strategic game of cat and mouse with the suspects for detectives and prosecutors to get justice.

programme.desc: Shocking first-hand accounts of people who were manipulated, abused, and finally broke free before it was too late. We'll hear from former members of Gwen Shamblin's Remnant Fellowship, and more.

programme.desc: In Tulsa, Det. White needs a former student to tell the truth about a shooting at an apartment complex. In Gwinnett, a man is shot in front of his friend as a robbery takes a deadly turn.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Murder In The Bayou - EP 1
programme.desc: When the body of free-spirited Bonnie Ruphard, 47, is spotted by a runner in Lafayette, LA, police suspect domestic violence.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Murder In The Bayou - EP 2
programme.desc: In 1991 Curtis "Cochise" Smith, 29, heads out for diapers in Plaquemine, Louisiana, and vanishes. Twenty-five years later, a body surfaces in the bayou, and Cochise's murder case reignites.

programme.title: Tell Me How I Died - EP 8
programme.desc: After a storm hits Warwick Cove, RI, a boat dragging its anchor appears in the harbour with a decomposed corpse onboard. Pathologist Dr. Priya Banerjee must identify the John Doe and determine how he died.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty Or Innocent? (S4) - EP 2
programme.desc: A traveling nurse is pulled over for a traffic violation in New Mexico and is arrested for felony burglary carried out in her home state of Ohio. Is she a thug for hire or innocent with a rock-solid alibi?

programme.title: Women On Death Row - EP 4
programme.desc: Linda Carty was sentenced to death on February 19, 2001 for the kidnapping of three-day-old newborn Ray Cabrera, and the kidnapping and murder of his mother, Joana Rodriguez.

programme.title: First Blood (S1) - EP 8
programme.desc: Charming and smart, Henry tried to hide his dark side, fuelled by years of abuse and twisted fantasies, until his first murder. Then, bad Henry took over.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S3) - EP 6
programme.desc: This special brings viewers inside the courtroom as celebrities are forced to sit in the hot seat and provide on-camera testimony.

programme.title: Accused: Did I Do It? - EP 1
programme.desc: A man is killed instantly after a head-on collision with a young mother driving home from a late-night shift at a Florida hotel. The Prosecution allege she was under the influence and caused the crash.

programme.title: Whale with Steve Backshall (S1) - EP 1
programme.desc: Steve Backshall explores the evolving understanding of whales, how much they have in common with humans, and how recent discoveries could help to better protect them from threats in an increasingly changing world.

programme.title: Extreme Treks (S2) - EP 8
programme.desc: Join Ryan Pyle as he explores Marrakech and goes on a trek in the Atlas Mountains.

programme.title: Where the Wild Men Are with Ben Fogle (S10) - EP 12
programme.desc: Ben stays with Naveen and Anke who have made their home in the Sri Lanka's highlands. He uncovers why they swapped one of the biggest cities in the world for a simple off-grid existence miles from civilisation.

programme.title: Food Factory (S2) - EP 5
programme.desc: Discover how modern technology has transformed the way traditional Indian flatbread is baked; crunchy cheesy puffs get a flavour as bright as their neon colour; cream filled cookies get that distinctly Canadian taste and shape; and decadent chocolates are filled.

programme.title: Food Factory (S2) - EP 6
programme.desc: Discover how zesty mustard gets its vibrant colour; luxurious orange creams come filled with a double hit of sweet and tart; nutty granola bars are jam packed with exotic ingredients; and what exactly goes into Tootsie Rolls to give them that old-school chewy texture.

programme.title: Joanna Lumley's Danube: Europe's Mightiest River (S1) - EP 3
programme.desc: In Budapest Joanna explores the river by boat and rides a unique children's railway, as well as discovering the city's Jewish heritage.

programme.title: Deadly Mission Shark (S1) - EP 9
programme.desc: As the team prepare for their great hammerhead experience, Steve has one more dive he wants some of them to experience. He takes four of the divers out to the wreck of an old ship which, over the years, has been colonised by a myriad of marine life. The young divers enter an underwater world inhabited by stunning fish and ocean turtles.

programme.title: Deadly Mission Shark (S1) - EP 10
programme.desc: The team of young shark saviours are coming to the end of their time in the shark sanctuary around the island of Bimini in the Bahamas. Now, they are on their last dive - to see great hammerheads.

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 1
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 2
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC’s ‘The Exchange’ is the newsroom-based program for today’s investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC’s "The Exchange" is the newsroom-based program for today’s Investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 1
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 2
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 1
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. "Closing Bell: Overtime" takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 2
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. "Closing Bell: Overtime" takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Fast Money - EP 1
programme.desc: "Fast Money" is America’s post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, "Fast Money" breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: Fast Money - EP 2
programme.desc: "Fast Money" is America’s post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, "Fast Money" breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: U.S. Markets Edition - EP 70
programme.desc: U.S. Markets Edition delivers key takeaways from the most impactful interviews and insights from CNBC’s programming in the US. As global markets become more interconnected, this program ensures audiences in Asia stay informed on major developments shaping the business world overnight.

programme.title: Squawk Box Asia - EP 1
programme.desc: Squawk Box Asia is CNBC’s flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and the opening of Asia’s business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers

programme.title: Squawk Box Asia - EP 2
programme.desc: Squawk Box Asia is CNBC’s flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and the opening of Asia’s business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers

programme.title: Squawk Box Asia - EP 3
programme.desc: Squawk Box Asia is CNBC’s flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and the opening of Asia’s business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers

programme.title: The China Connection - EP 1
programme.desc: The China Connection delivers in-depth analysis of China’s economy, markets and its relationship with the global landscape. Emily Chan brings you expert insights, exclusive interviews, covering key sectors, trade developments and policy shifts.

programme.title: The China Connection - EP 2
programme.desc: The China Connection delivers in-depth analysis of China’s economy, markets and its relationship with the global landscape. Emily Chan brings you expert insights, exclusive interviews, covering key sectors, trade developments and policy shifts.

programme.title: Inside India - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC’s Inside India gives you news and market commentary on the emerging powerhouse, businesses and people behind its rise. Inside India goes beyond the headlines to give you the edge and insights - this is your gateway to the India story.

programme.title: Inside India - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC’s Inside India gives you news and market commentary on the emerging powerhouse, businesses and people behind its rise. Inside India goes beyond the headlines to give you the edge and insights - this is your gateway to the India story.

programme.title: Access Middle East - EP 1
programme.desc: Access Middle East is your window into Middle East power, money, and influence. With exclusive interviews and high-level analysis, the program brings viewers closer to the decision-makers deploying capital and driving innovation in one of the world’s most dynamic regions.

programme.title: Access Middle East - EP 2
programme.desc: Access Middle East is your window into Middle East power, money, and influence. With exclusive interviews and high-level analysis, the program brings viewers closer to the decision-makers deploying capital and driving innovation in one of the world’s most dynamic regions.

programme.title: Europe Early Edition - EP 1
programme.desc: Start your trading day with Europe Early Edition as European financial centres take the reins of global markets. With breaking news, key earnings and data, as well as interviews with market makers and C-Suite executives from across the globe, Europe Early Edition is essential viewing to be prepared for the day’s session.

programme.title: Europe Early Edition - EP 2
programme.desc: Start your trading day with Europe Early Edition as European financial centres take the reins of global markets. With breaking news, key earnings and data, as well as interviews with market makers and C-Suite executives from across the globe, Europe Early Edition is essential viewing to be prepared for the day’s session.

programme.title: Squawk Box Europe - EP 1
programme.desc: It’s one hour until the opening bell in Europe and Squawk Box Europe has everything you need to prepare for the first trade. Steve Sedgwick, Karen Tso and Julianna Tatelbaum take on the most complex stories of the day with instant analysis on how you can make your money work around the news.

programme.title: Morning Call - EP 1
programme.desc: Morning Call, anchored by Morgan Brennan, delivers the essential market intelligence that drives the trading day ahead. The program captures breaking business news as it unfolds and tracks pre market equity moves, commodity swings, U.S. futures, and overnight action across global markets.

programme.desc: "Squawk Box" is the ultimate pre-market morning news and talk program, where the biggest names in business and politics tell their most important stories. programme.desc: Chinese companies dominate the EV battery supply chain and are expanding rapidly outside their home market. Meanwhile, competitors are looking to new chemistries to leapfrog the leading tech.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S2 - EP 2
programme.desc: Humanoid robots that use AI are going mainstream, but they’re far from proven. With billions of dollars invested, can they deliver real-world value or will they fall short of the hype?

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: Geothermal has been the underdog of the energy industry - but that may be about to change as new startups use fracking technologies to expand potential geothermal sites.

programme.desc: Flying cars have largely remained science fiction, until now. A new generation of electrified aircraft is attracting the attention of investors and venture capitalists around the world.

programme.title: The Hidden Cost of South Sudan's Oil Boom
programme.desc: South Sudan relies on oil for almost all of its revenue. But some communities living near the oil fields allege polluted water is causing birth defects and miscarriages, raising questions over health and responsibility.

programme.title: Tesla's Dangerous Doors
programme.desc: A number of fatal car crashes involving Tesla vehicles has prompted increased scrutiny of its electric doors, triggering lawsuits over whether the design can leave passengers trapped.

programme.title: How China Is Building an Army of Hackers
programme.desc: China and the US actively engage in cyber espionage for strategic advantage. Leaked files now suggest how rapidly Beijing is catching up in preparation for any future conflict.

programme.title: A Dangerous Corner of the Global Shipping Industry
programme.desc: The sinking of the Gulf Livestock 1 was the worst disaster in the history of the live-export trade, an industry made up of about 150 ships with a market value totaling $20 billion to $30 billion.

programme.title: Inside the Deaths That Rocked India's Relations With the West
programme.desc: This is the story of how two alleged murder plots involving Sikh activists brought India, the US and Canada to a diplomatic crisis.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: Gold built South Africa, but mining kills some who dig for it. In Stilfontein, a disaster that trapped miners underground reveals how a quest for gold became a story of hunger, survival and death.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates S5 - EP 5
programme.desc: A police raid in a small town in the Philippines revealed a young mayor's alleged connections to a $2 billion Singapore money laundering scandal and Chinese espionage.

Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.desc: Masaharu (Tamayama Tetsuji), who travels alone to Scotland to learn the art of whisky making, meets Ellie (Charlotte Kate Fox) and falls in love. Masaharu dreams of creating Japan’s first domestically produced whisky, while Ellie, who has left her homeland and come to Japan for the first time, faces a series of challenges. This is the story of love and adventure as Massan and Ellie, united by the strength of their bond, through a turbulent era with unwavering resolve.

programme.title: Drama "Thus Spoke Kishibe Rohan" Spin-off (R)
programme.desc: "That’s a terrible way to put it!" Manga editor Izumi Kyoka bristles when Kishibe Rohan harshly criticizes a smash hit by rookie artist Saion Mika. Though furious, Kyoka cannot shake his warning. She has never met Mika-only spoken to her brother, Saion Soushi, by phone. Driven by unease, Kyoka visits the Saion home to meet the artist at last. Mika remains silent, answering nothing. Soushi speaks for her. The imbalance behind the manga’s success surfaces slowly.

programme.title: Night Drama Serial "Radio Star" Ep. 24
programme.desc: Hiiragi Kanade (Fukuchi Momoko) arrives in Noto as a volunteer and unexpectedly ends up launching a community radio station with the local residents. But there’s no experience, no budget, and no studio - only a shared desire to bring light back to a town hurt by earthquakes and torrential rain. Once the broadcast begins, there’s no turning back. A nonstop entertainment drama where ordinary citizens find themselves becoming stars.

programme.title: Wassup Man! Let's Chill! Let' Go Play! - EP 34
programme.desc: A trip without a purpose, just go on a whim, so simple, are you willing to join us? A journey that witnesses the friendship of men begins!Let's go! Bring a simple bag, ride a hot-blooded motorcycle, and have fun traveling and charging.

programme.title: Dee Girls Talk - EP 491
programme.desc: Hosted by Dee Hsu, the most queenly artist in the entertainment industry, and partnered with the humorous assistant host Patrick, each episode invites many of the most popular and topical artists and Internet celebrities to appear on the show. Through Dee Hsu Her profound and spicy hosting skills stirred up unparalleled "laughter" with the guests.

programme.title: Big Boys Club
programme.desc: Each episode of Big Boys Club invites singers, artistes as well as people from different walks of life as guests onto the show, participating in relaxed interviews and discussing current trends.

programme.title: TAKE MY WORD FOR IT - EP 20
programme.desc: This drama centres around the experiences of members of the Police Negotiation Cadre (PNC), a volunteer unit of the Hong Kong police force specialising in negotiations with terrorist members, partakers of local violence, as well as individuals contemplating suicide.

programme.title: Case X Decoded & What's On Today - EP 2
programme.desc: A rift develops between sheriff To Hoi Bun and policewoman Yim Cheuk Wing due to an unresolved case. Later, while re-investigating it, they clear up their misunderstandings, and through repeated collaboration build a strong bond as partners fighting side by side.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2800
programme.desc: Hung Shu-Kan owns a logistics business. The only thing on his mind is the well-being of his three daughters. His eldest daughter has moved abroad, but his second youngest daughter, Yuek-Shui, is still single. She and her little sister Sum-Yue often squabble, putting their father in a dilemma.

programme.title: Scoop 2026
programme.desc: This programme goes hot on the heels of the biggest happenings in society and the entertainment scene, bringing you the latest scoops.

programme.title: The Magic Voice
programme.desc: The Magic Voice is a reality show that follows 16 female artists as they undergo intensive training in singing, dancing and rap. Through a series of eliminations, they battle for a chance to debut as a brand-new girl group!

programme.title: Romance of A Twin Flower - EP 31
programme.desc: Ji Man loses her memory after a fall and awakens as the hated wife of Minister Ning Yuxuan, but turns her fate around through wit, helping him win imperial favour. Together they defeat powerful enemies and overcome political plots, finally finding love amid hardship.

programme.desc: Big City Shop introduces viewers to the latest products on fashion, skin care, make-up, health care, baby care and much more!

programme.title: Happy Old Buddies
programme.desc: This show brings on doctors and Chinese medicine practitioners to discuss diseases that the elderly should pay attention to, and provide prevention and treatment methods.

programme.desc: Magic offers a wondrous experience beyond understanding, but could it simply be a scientific phenomenon? Louis Yan, along with Crystal Fung and Eileen Ho, put on captivating performances, with "star students" carefully analysing them, choosing between magic and science!

programme.title: The Queen of Castle - EP 12
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Wing-sing’s son Or Yui-fai performs to raise funds for Zodiac Charity Foundation. After finding out the situation, Wing-sing goes to the venue and drags Yui-fai away, causing Yui-fai to have a panic attack. Fortunately, Kai-shum helps him calm down. Wing-sing wants Kai-ching and Kin-pong to join the Zodiac Medical City project team and seek benefits for him.
